title: Embedded / IoT Developer
description: Build firmware and IoT systems for microcontrollers and edge devices. From C/C++ programming to RTOS, PCB design, and Edge AI deployment.

nodes.title: C/C++ Programming
nodes.description: C and C++ for embedded — pointers, memory management, bitwise operations, and bare-metal programming.

nodes.title: Electronics Fundamentals
nodes.description: Voltage, current, resistance, Ohm's law, capacitors, inductors, and basic circuit analysis.

nodes.title: Digital Electronics
nodes.description: Logic gates, flip-flops, multiplexers, ADC/DAC, and digital communication protocols.

nodes.title: Microcontrollers
nodes.description: Arduino, ESP32, STM32, Raspberry Pi Pico — GPIO, timers, interrupts, and peripherals.

nodes.title: Sensors & Actuators
nodes.description: Temperature, humidity, IMU, GPS, ultrasonic, motors, servos, and display modules.

nodes.title: Communication Protocols
nodes.description: UART, SPI, I2C, CAN bus, and serial communication between devices.

nodes.title: Wireless Protocols
nodes.description: WiFi, Bluetooth/BLE, LoRa, Zigbee, MQTT, and CoAP for IoT connectivity.

nodes.title: Real-Time OS (RTOS)
nodes.description: FreeRTOS, Zephyr, or RIOT — tasks, scheduling, semaphores, mutexes, and inter-task communication.

nodes.title: Firmware Architecture
nodes.description: Bare-metal vs RTOS, bootloader design, OTA updates, and firmware patterns.

nodes.title: PCB Design Basics
nodes.description: KiCad or Eagle — schematic capture, PCB layout, routing, and manufacturing files (Gerber).

nodes.title: Power Management
nodes.description: Battery management, power regulators, low-power design, sleep modes, and energy harvesting.

nodes.title: Testing & Debugging
nodes.description: Oscilloscopes, logic analyzers, JTAG/SWD debugging, and serial monitors.

nodes.title: IoT Security
nodes.description: Secure boot, firmware encryption, TLS for IoT, device authentication, and secure element chips.

nodes.title: Cloud IoT Platforms
nodes.description: AWS IoT Core, Google Cloud IoT, Azure IoT Hub — device management, telemetry, and command/control.

nodes.title: Edge Computing & Edge AI
nodes.description: TinyML, TensorFlow Lite Micro, edge inference, and deploying ML models on microcontrollers.

nodes.title: Git for Embedded Projects
nodes.description: Version control for firmware, managing binary assets, and CI/CD for embedded systems.

nodes.title: MicroPython / CircuitPython
nodes.description: Python on microcontrollers — rapid prototyping with MicroPython and CircuitPython.

nodes.title: Home Automation
nodes.description: Home Assistant, ESPHome, and DIY smart home devices with ESP32/ESP8266.

nodes.title: Signal Processing
nodes.description: ADC sampling, digital filtering (FIR/IIR), FFT, and signal conditioning.

nodes.title: Motor Control
nodes.description: DC motors, stepper motors, servo control, PWM, and motor driver circuits (L298N, DRV8825).

nodes.title: Embedded Dev Tools
nodes.description: Build systems (CMake, Make), IDEs (VS Code + extensions), and toolchains (GCC ARM).
